otp.title: Verify OTP
otp.emailMessage: An OTP has been sent to your email address
otp.mobileMessage: An OTP has been sent to your mobile number

login.title: Log in to your account
login.subtitle: Enter your email and password to continue

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email or phone number to reset your password
forgotPassword.emptyIdentifier: Please enter your email or phone number
forgotPassword.rateLimitExceeded: You can request password reset only once per day
forgotPassword.successMessage: New password has been sent to your email.
forgotPassword.securityNoticeText: If you did not request this password reset, please contact support immediately.

askQuestion.title: Ask a public question
askQuestion.dailyLimit: Daily question limit reached for your plan. Please upgrade to post more questions.
askQuestion.limitReached: You've reached your daily question limit ({{posted}}/{{limit}}).
askQuestion.upgradePlan: Upgrade your plan to post more questions.
askQuestion.titleHelp: Be specific and imagine you're asking a question to another person.
askQuestion.titlePlaceholder: e.g. How to center a div in CSS?
askQuestion.problemDetails: What are the details of your problem?
askQuestion.problemHelp: Introduce the problem and expand on what you put in the title. Minimum 20 characters.
askQuestion.tagsHelp: Add up to 5 tags to describe what your question is about.

auth.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
